message:
chore(beads): close frankenpandas-fd90.35

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -466,7 +466,7 @@
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.32","title":"test(readme): RuntimeMode::Hardened + DecisionAction::Allow/Repair + IssueKind variant coverage","description":"readme_bayesian_runtime_policy currently only exercises:
- RuntimeMode::Strict (Hardened untested)
- DecisionAction::Reject (Allow + Repair untested)
- IssueKind::UnknownFeature (3 other variants untested)

The Hardened policy with decide_join_admission produces a decision but the test does not assert which action / mode appears in the resulting record.

Plan: extend the existing test to:
- Inspect the hardened ledger's record
- Assert mode == RuntimeMode::Hardened
- Drive decide_join_admission with a small row count (cheap join → likely Allow)
  vs a huge row count to exercise Allow vs Repair branching","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T13:03:44.031674681Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T13:05:48.477576905Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T13:05:48.475452871Z","close_reason":"completed: Hardened mode + Repair + JoinCardinality covered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.32","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T13:03:44.031674681Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.33","title":"test(readme): AlignMode + DateOffset + date_range/bdate_range functional coverage","description":"Self-review caught these uncovered surfaces:

AlignMode: only Outer is tested via df.align_on_index. The 3 other variants (Inner, Left, Right) are pandas-parity surface for index alignment.

DateOffset: 3 variants (Day, BusinessDay, MonthEnd). Only DateOffset::Day(1) is named in the prelude completeness guard — none are functionally driven via apply_date_offset.

date_range / bdate_range: in the prelude since fd90.261 / fd90.269 but never called functionally.

Plan: add readme_align_and_date_offset_round_trip exercising each AlignMode variant on overlapping indexes (assert returned label sets), each DateOffset variant via apply_date_offset on a known timestamp, plus date_range and bdate_range calls with shape assertions.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T13:09:30.104178264Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T13:12:10.143851226Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T13:12:10.141854537Z","close_reason":"completed: AlignMode/DateOffset/date_range covered + apply_date_offset promoted","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.33","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T13:09:30.104178264Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.34","title":"test(readme): NullKind::NaT + IntervalClosed::Both/Neither variant coverage","description":"Self-review caught:

NullKind: 3 variants (Null, NaN, NaT). NaN and Null tested; NaT untested. NaT is the timestamp-specific null marker (datetime/timedelta).

IntervalClosed: 4 variants (Left, Right, Both, Neither). Left and Right tested; Both and Neither untested. These have observable behavior on the contains() method:
- Both: '[a, b]' — both endpoints inclusive
- Neither: '(a, b)' — both endpoints exclusive

Plan: extend readme_pandas_helpers_round_trip with assertions for IntervalClosed::Both and ::Neither contains() behavior at endpoints. Add NullKind::NaT round-trip via Scalar::Null(NullKind::NaT) serde test.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T13:13:03.556217537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T13:14:51.047670235Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T13:14:51.045642556Z","close_reason":"completed: NullKind::NaT + IntervalClosed::Both/Neither covered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.34","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T13:13:03.556217537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.35","title":"test(readme): IndexLabel (Utf8 / Timedelta64 / Datetime64) variant coverage","description":"IndexLabel has 4 variants: Int64, Utf8, Timedelta64, Datetime64. Only Int64 is exercised by integration tests. The 3 typed-temporal variants are core pandas surface (string indexes for grouped data, datetime indexes for time series, timedelta indexes for durations).

Plan: add readme_index_label_variants_round_trip exercising each variant:
- Utf8: Series with string IndexLabel → operate on it via .loc/.values
- Datetime64: Series with datetime ns IndexLabel → operate on it
- Timedelta64: Series with timedelta ns IndexLabel → operate on it

Asserts each variant supports basic Series construction + value lookup.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T13:15:41.802855505Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T13:16:18.693670208Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.35","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T13:15:41.802855505Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.35","title":"test(readme): IndexLabel (Utf8 / Timedelta64 / Datetime64) variant coverage","description":"IndexLabel has 4 variants: Int64, Utf8, Timedelta64, Datetime64. Only Int64 is exercised by integration tests. The 3 typed-temporal variants are core pandas surface (string indexes for grouped data, datetime indexes for time series, timedelta indexes for durations).

Plan: add readme_index_label_variants_round_trip exercising each variant:
- Utf8: Series with string IndexLabel → operate on it via .loc/.values
- Datetime64: Series with datetime ns IndexLabel → operate on it
- Timedelta64: Series with timedelta ns IndexLabel → operate on it

Asserts each variant supports basic Series construction + value lookup.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T13:15:41.802855505Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T13:19:44.466650730Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T13:19:44.464407343Z","close_reason":"completed: 3 IndexLabel variants covered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.35","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T13:15:41.802855505Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","title":"fp-io SQL chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine pandas-style chunksize with index_col promotion. Cover read_sql/read_sql_query/read_sql_table chunk paths by wrapping SqlChunkIterator, preserving per-chunk RangeIndex when index_col is None and promoting/removing the named column when set. Add umbrella re-exports and focused fp-io tests for query chunks, table chunks, None behavior, and missing index_col errors.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.040272870Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.038384696Z","close_reason":"Completed in 90fd549","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","title":"fp-io SQL options chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine SqlReadOptions with index_col promotion for read_sql/read_sql_query paths. Reuse read_sql_chunks_with_options plus the indexed chunk wrapper, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for params/parse_dates/coerce_float with index_col, None behavior, and missing index_col validation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.447171200Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.445331175Z","close_reason":"Completed in 48c06e1","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.6","title":"fp-io SQL table columns index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns helpers that combine pandas-style columns projection with index_col promotion, including chunksize support. Reuse table/column validation and SqlIndexedChunkIterator, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, index promotion, None behavior, missing index_col validation, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:17:53.092719400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:23:29.256718983Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:23:29.254823083Z","close_reason":"Completed in 49678e3","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.6","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:17:53.092719400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
